configuration.overlap_policy: one open position per ticker per scenario

confirmed_breakout.next_action: Stop tuning this scanner formulation. Redesign the entry hypothesis before any further backtest.

tradeable_second_leg.next_action: Accumulate at least 100 independent events or extend unchanged history; do not tune additional factors.

production_decision.rule: P1.3 is a stopping-rule stage. No result changes production or Shadow Mode automatically.

validation_repair.portfolio_non_overlap_definition: one open position per ticker per scenario across both paths
validation_repair.path_non_overlap_definition: one open position per ticker + path + scenario
validation_repair.reason: Do not erase Second Leg path samples because of prior Confirmed Breakout positions; do not evaluate a fixed target with a stop wider than the scenario RR permits.

p12_subgroup_analysis.selection_rule: Train only: average>0, median>0, PF>=1.20, stop rate<55%; confirmed n>=30, second-leg n>=15.
p12_subgroup_analysis.oos_rule: OOS n>=10, average>0, median>0, PF>1.0, stop rate<60%.

p13_rolling_oos_triage.purpose: Falsification and stopping-rule stage after P1.2 produced no robust subgroup.
p13_rolling_oos_triage.fold_pass_rule: test n>=10, average>0, median>0, PF>=1.20, stop rate<55%
p13_rolling_oos_triage.stable_rule_rule: same path/scenario/condition robust in >=2 annual folds and latest holdout

confirmed_breakout.next_action: Stop tuning this scanner formulation. Redesign the entry hypothesis before any further backtest.

tradeable_second_leg.next_action: Accumulate at least 100 independent events or extend unchanged history; do not tune additional factors.
